title: TS6 6UE, Northumbrian Water Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/LP3439LK/V012
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Northumbrian Water Limited Installation name: Industrial Effluent Treatment Works Permit number: EPR/LP3439LK  "
